$comment: Typecheck config for @context-engine/editor-core, run by the pinned tsgo (--noEmit) from ../CMakeLists.txt as a BUILD step — a type error is a build failure, not merely a test failure (e05a DoD). esbuild strips types without checking them, so this is the only semantic gate over the workspace. Kept strict from day one: editor-core is a trusted zone that renders authored project strings (design 04 section 4), so type sloppiness here has a security dimension.
